experiments.title: Executable four-column accounting oracle
experiments.result: 34 focused tests passed for typed dimensions, sparse exact covered folds, four-column conservation, strong cap-definedness, separate count bounds, mutations, and identity/no-op distinctions.

experiments.title: Lean algebra, conservation, capacity, and tree invariance
experiments.runner: Build and explicit leanchecker commands recorded in evidence/lean.json
experiments.result: Lean 4.32.0 built 7 dependency jobs and 10 jobs for the accounting package with warnings fatal; explicit leanchecker replay passed for both root modules, and the package sources contain no sorry, axiom, or admit.

experiments.title: Independent canonical vector replay
experiments.result: Independent fixed-width row, row-root, coverage-entry, and coverage-manifest preimages matched committed vectors; 9/9 strict-untrusted canonicality negatives rejected. This is syntactic codec, type-separation, order, and multiplicity evidence only.

experiments.title: Full reference-model regression suite
experiments.result: All 122 reference-model tests passed after adding and red-teaming the accounting slice.

experiments.title: Research Kernel hypothesis and refutation run
experiments.runner: Pinned Research Kernel MCP stdio run described in research_kernel_receipt.json
experiments.result: The first pass made 78 MCP calls, built 82 atoms and 65 edges, and recorded four actual counterexamples; a second evidence pass is recorded separately in the receipt.

experiments.title: Pinned ARM code and specification boundary review
experiments.runner: GitHub connector reads at ARM commit 1b552f17b1c94943e6f81d08e2986befc26e99e9 plus Anoma v1.0.0 specification
experiments.result: ARM additive delta and receipt composition inform balance authentication but do not define ZRM four-column accounting, units, coverage, or authority.

experiments.title: Research packet fail-closed validation
experiments.result: Schema, references, statuses, artifact paths, evidence counts, Lean placeholder scanning, and manifest digests passed the packet checker and all 18 checker/mutation tests.

experiments.title: ESSO accounting aggregation mutant campaign
experiments.runner: Pinned ESSO db8a3f8a782a508ada5005a2cf177f25c58f451d; commands in esso_campaign.json
experiments.result: Not executed because the private ESSO source was not materialized in this local checkout; no mutant-kill claim is made.

experiments.title: Rust U256 and accepted-journal adapter refinement
experiments.runner: Future cargo test, property, Kani, and differential harness
experiments.result: Required before implementation promotion: fixed U256 carries, canonical decode, witness root matching, profile substitution, and Rust-to-Lean refinement.

experiments.title: Accounting disclosure budget
experiments.runner: Future workload-driven privacy and leakage analysis
experiments.result: Must quantify gross churn, mint/burn activity, dimension cardinality, and coverage correlation before a production public profile is selected.

experiments.title: Circuit carry and field-wrap refinement
experiments.result: Must prove every U256 limb and carry is range constrained and that proof-field modular addition cannot wrap silently.

experiments.title: Data-availability retention drill
experiments.runner: Future retained-opening retrieval and failure-injection drill
experiments.result: Must demonstrate bounded retrieval of every committed accounting opening or fail composition without weakening historical journal validity.

non_claims: Passed models and proofs establish only their recorded abstractions and do not approve RFC-0004.
Source review is not a security audit of ARM, ZRM, RISC Zero, or external papers.
Specified experiments are not executed evidence.
